meta.title: The AIM-120 AMRAAM is the US' preferred long-range air-to-air missile
meta.description:
Here's a brief rundown on America's preferred beyond-visual-range air-to-air missile, the radar-guided AIM-120 AMRAAM. 

Make sure to follow Sandboxx for all the latest in news and entertainment from all around the force!
